title: TotemCraft
body:
**TotemCraft is a lightweight datapack that adds a recipe to craft Totem of Undying.**

### Why these materials?
  Emerald - Related to Villagers/Pillagers. And because its the eye of the Totem of Undying.\
  Ghast Tear - A Life force and acts as a difficulty layer.\
  Sandstone - For relation with the Desert.\
  Gold Ingot - Acts as a difficulty layer and because the Totem of Undying looks like its Gold-coated.

### Why use this datapack?
  TotemCraft makes it so that you dont have to make a Raid/Totem farm to get Totems of Undying, instead you can craft them using Emeralds, Sandstones, Gold Ingots, and a Ghast Tear. Plus Raid/Totem farms may get laggy, so you don't have to lag anymore with this datapack.

### Compatibility: 
  This datapack only adds a recipe. It should work with most datapacks unless 
  they also use the same name.

### Problems?
  Contact me on discord on my server.

### Installation (Datapack): 
####  Download the datapack.
####  Place it in the world's datapacks folder.
####  Run /reload or restart the world.
![The Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/80b61b17a7112e078191d6761447a8496fd0185f.png)
